translations.### ***[補充] Offerwall 獎勵牆廣告與獎勵型廣告類型說明***: ### ***[Supplement] Explanation of Offerwall Reward Wall Ads and Rewarded Ad Types***
translations.### Google Offerwall 廣告 — 內容創作者的全新收益選擇\n: ### Google Offerwall Ads — A New Revenue Option for Content Creators
translations.### Medium To Github Pages x Google Offe: ### Medium To Github Pages x Google Offerwall
translations.#### Offerwall — 獎勵牆廣告是什麼？\n\n: #### Offerwall — What is Reward Wall Advertising?
translations.**For 問券、小額支付、訂閱電子報** ：任何網站都能使用此機制快速建立Po: **For surveys, micro-payments, and newsletter subscriptions**: Any website can quickly create pop-up ads using this mechanism.
translations.**For 廣告** ：同 Google Adsense 適合無自售廣告版位的中:
**For Advertisers**: Like Google Adsense, it is suitable for small to medium content websites or personal blogs without self-selling ad spaces, such as sites hosted on [Wordpress](https://wordpress.com/zh-tw/){:target="_blank"} or [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com/){:target="_blank"}. Besides displaying regular ad spaces, you can also set up Offerwall rewarded ads for valuable content articles.  
**This article uses For Advertisers as a case study; currently, all features except advertising are still in Beta.**
translations.**出價低** ：這也是 Google Adesnse 的通病，廣告出價低。\n: **Low Bids**: This is also a common issue with Google AdSense, where ad bids are generally low.
translations.**前往 [Google Adsense](https://adsense.go: **Go to [Google Adsense](https://adsense.google.com/){:target="_blank"} -> Ads -> By site -> Get code:**
**Go to [Google Adsense](https://adsense.google.com/){:target="_blank"} -> Privacy & messages -> Manage -> Create message:**
translations.**容易阻擋** ：因為 Google Offerwall 是純前端遮蔽廣告，所: **Easy to block**: Since Google Offerwall is a pure front-end overlay ad, it can be easily bypassed by ad blockers or users using developer tools; **therefore, it is not recommended to implement it on sensitive, important, or valuable content.**
translations.**實現容易** ：只要網站 [嵌入動態廣告程式碼](https://suppo: **Easy Implementation**: Just embed the [dynamic ad code](https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/9189560?hl=zh-Hant){:target="_blank"} on your website once, and use it for life.
translations.**彈性多元** ：提供更彈性多元的內容、流量變現方式。\n: **Flexible and Diverse**: Offers more flexible and diverse content and traffic monetization methods.
translations.**您的網站** ：設定要套用的網站\n: **Your Website**: Set the website to apply
translations.**文案設定：** 指定文案內容、記得至少要上傳個 Logo 增加品牌力\n: **Copy Settings:** Specify the copy content, and remember to upload at least a logo to enhance brand strength
translations.**樣式設定：** 點擊 7 文案後還可以從這邊設定文字樣式、顏色\n可以參考:
**Style Settings:** After clicking on the 7 texts, you can also set the text style and color here.  
You can refer to [Testing Method](https://support.google.com/admanager/answer/13860694?hl=zh-Hant#zippy=%2C%E5%A6%82%E4%BD%95%E6%B8%AC%E8%A9%A6-offerwall){:target="_blank"} and add `?fc=alwaysshow&fctype=monetization` to the page URL to preview the result.
translations.**獎勵廣告** ：可設定完成任務的內容解鎖獎勵，可以是時間內無限次數瀏覽或是有:
**Rewarded Ads**: You can set rewards that unlock content after completing tasks, such as unlimited views within a time frame or a limited number of page views. After the reward expires, the task must be completed again.  
*Here, I set it so that completing one task allows unlimited viewing for 24 hours.*
translations.**發佈變更** ：都設定好之後記得按發佈\n: **Publish Changes**: Remember to click publish after everything is set up.
translations.**直接獲利** ：同 Google Adesnse 好處，不需要自己建置複雜的: **Direct Profit**: Like Google AdSense, there is no need to build a complex ad system or data tracking system; nor do you need to find advertisers yourself. Everything is managed and operated by the platform.
translations.**網頁納入項目和排除項目** ：可設定要涵蓋的頁面網址或是排除的網址\n*這邊:
**Included and Excluded Pages**: You can set which page URLs to include or exclude  
*Here, I set it so that only URLs under the `https://zhgchg.li/posts/` path will trigger.*
translations.**計量** ：可設定使用者瀏覽第幾個(次)網頁後才觸發\n*這邊我設 0 代表:
**Measurement**: You can set after how many page views the trigger occurs  
*Here, I set it to 0, meaning it triggers on the first time.*
translations.**跨平台** ：支援手機、電腦版。\n: **Cross-platform**: Supports both mobile and desktop versions.
translations.**預設語言** ：設定預設語言與支援的其他語言，可在左上方切換語言編輯不同語言: **Default Language**: Set the default language and other supported languages. You can switch languages at the top left to edit content in different languages.
translations.*也可以在這個頁面查看廣告收益。*\n\n: *You can also check ad revenue on this page.*
translations.*因為 Medium 付費牆機制要求讀者必須花月費加入 Medium 才能閱讀文: *Because Medium's paywall requires readers to subscribe monthly to access articles, which I find unfriendly to information sharing, I have not joined the paywall program; Google Offerwall perfectly fills this gap, allowing users to support content creators by simply watching ads without mandatory monthly fees, while creators still earn revenue—benefiting both sides!*
translations.- **Easy Implementation**: Just embed th:
- **Easy Implementation**: Just embed the [dynamic ad code](https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/9189560?hl=zh-Hant){:target="_blank"} on your website once, and use it for life.

- **Direct Profit**: Like Google AdSense, there is no need to build a complex ad system or data tracking system; nor do you need to find advertisers yourself. Everything is managed and operated by the platform.

- **Flexible and Diverse**: Offers more flexible and diverse content and traffic monetization methods.

- **Cross-platform**: Supports both mobile and desktop versions.
translations.- **For Advertisers**: Like Google Adsen:
- **For Advertisers**: Like Google Adsense, it is suitable for small to medium content websites or personal blogs without self-selling ad spaces, such as sites hosted on [Wordpress](https://wordpress.com/zh-tw/){:target="_blank"} or [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com/){:target="_blank"}. Besides displaying regular ad spaces, you can also set up Offerwall rewarded ads for valuable content articles.  
  **This article uses For Advertisers as a case study; currently, all features except advertising are still in Beta.**

- **For surveys, micro-payments, and newsletter subscriptions**: Any website can quickly create pop-up ads using this mechanism.
translations.- **Low Bids**: This is also a common is:
- **Low Bids**: This is also a common issue with Google AdSense, where ad bids are generally low.

- **Easy to block**: Since Google Offerwall is a pure front-end overlay ad, it can be easily bypassed by ad blockers or users using developer tools; **therefore, it is not recommended to implement it on sensitive, important, or valuable content.**
translations.1. **Ad Name**\n\n2. **Your Website**: S:
1. **Ad Name**

2. **Your Website**: Set the website to apply

3. **Included and Excluded Pages**: You can set which page URLs to include or exclude  
   *Here, I set it so that only URLs under the `https://zhgchg.li/posts/` path will trigger.*

4. **Default Language**: Set the default language and other supported languages. You can switch languages at the top left to edit content in different languages.

5. **Measurement**: You can set after how many page views the trigger occurs  
   *Here, I set it to 0, meaning it triggers on the first time.*

6. **Rewarded Ads**: You can set rewards that unlock content after completing tasks, such as unlimited views within a time frame or a limited number of page views. After the reward expires, the task must be completed again.  
   *Here, I set it so that completing one task allows unlimited viewing for 24 hours.*

7. **Copy Settings:** Specify the copy content, and remember to upload at least a logo to enhance brand strength

8. **Style Settings:** After clicking on the 7 texts, you can also set the text style and color here.  
   You can refer to [Testing Method](https://support.google.com/admanager/answer/13860694?hl=zh-Hant#zippy=%2C%E5%A6%82%E4%BD%95%E6%B8%AC%E8%A9%A6-offerwall){:target="_blank"} and add `?fc=alwaysshow&fctype=monetization` to the page URL to preview the result.

9. **Publish Changes**: Remember to click publish after everything is set up.
translations.3, 5, 6\n\n:
3. **Advantages**

- Easy to implement: Just embed the Google AdSense code.
- Direct monetization: Earn revenue directly from user interactions.
- Flexible and diverse: Supports various tasks like watching ads, surveys, or micro-payments.
- Cross-platform support: Works on websites, apps, and other platforms.

5. **Technical Requirements**

- Apply for a Google AdSense account.
- Embed dynamic Google Offerwall ad code into your website or app.
- Set up tasks and rewards according to your content strategy.

6. **Setup and Testing**

- Insert the Google Offerwall ad script into your site.
- Configure tasks such as watching ads or completing surveys.
- Test the functionality to ensure users can unlock content after completing tasks.
translations.4, 8\n\n:
4. **Technical Requirements**

- Apply for a Google AdSense account.
- Embed the Google Offerwall dynamic ad code into your site.

8. **Testing**

After embedding the Offerwall ad code, test it on your site to ensure the tasks and rewards work correctly. Use different devices and browsers to verify compatibility.
translations.> *Because Medium's paywall requires rea: > *Because Medium's paywall requires readers to subscribe monthly to access articles, which I find unfriendly to information sharing, I have not joined the paywall program; Google Offerwall perfectly fills this gap, allowing users to support content creators by simply watching ads without mandatory monthly fees, while creators still earn revenue—benefiting both sides!*
translations.> *You can also check ad revenue on this: > *You can also check ad revenue on this page.*
translations.Google Offerwall 廣告的淺談與試用，可快速將既有流量內容轉換成限: A Brief Introduction and Trial of Google Offerwall Ads, Quickly Converting Existing Traffic Content into Access Restricted by Small Payments or Ad Viewing.
translations.「 [Google Offerwall](https://support.goo: [Google Offerwall](https://support.google.com/admanager/answer/13860694?hl=zh-Hant){:target="_blank"} is what I consider a **reward-based Offerwall ad** that combines features of rewarded ads. Developers can easily **require users to complete tasks to access specific website content pages**. The **tasks are Offerwall reward tasks**, which can be set as completing surveys, watching ads, making small payments, subscribing to newsletters, or [integrating tasks from your own system](https://support.google.com/admanager/answer/13566866?hl=zh-Hant&ref_topic=13821812&sjid=14925592883586634734-NC){:target="_blank"}. The rewards grant access permissions that can be unlimited for a few hours or days, or limited by quantity. All of this can be achieved simply by embedding Google Adsense dynamic ad code, without the need to develop your own system.
translations.使用無痕瀏覽器、確認沒有啟用擋廣告、反追蹤套件，後前往規則內的網頁：\n\n: Use an incognito browser and make sure no ad blockers or anti-tracking extensions are enabled, then visit the webpage within the rules:
translations.可參考我之前的文章「 [無痛轉移 Medium 到自架網站](../a0c08d: You can refer to my previous article "[Effortlessly Migrate Medium to a Self-Hosted Site](../a0c08d579ab1/)" to mirror your Medium articles to a static website hosted on GitHub Pages. Then, add Google Offerwall to the site to monetize your content.
translations.因為我的瀏覽量不高，所以單次點擊出價也都不太高，大約點擊一次廣告在 USD $0: Because my traffic is low, the bid per click is also not high, roughly between USD $0.01 and $0.07 per click.
translations.將程式碼內容貼到網站的 `<head></head>` 區塊之間：\n\n: Paste the code inside the website’s `<head></head>` section:
translations.或直接參考「 [Medium Partner Program 終於對全球(包含台: Or directly refer to "[Medium Partner Program is finally open to writers worldwide (including Taiwan)!](../cefdf4d41746/)" to add a paywall to your Medium articles and earn revenue.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.獎勵型廣告是一種常見於遊戲與行動應用中的廣告形式，使用者只需自願完成特定行為，例: Rewarded ads are a common ad format in games and mobile apps, where users voluntarily complete specific actions, such as **watching a video, clicking interactive content, or trying a feature**, to earn rewards like virtual currency, extra lives, or game items.
translations.獎勵完成後訊息，目前不能更改。\n\n: The post-completion reward message cannot be changed at this time.
translations.盡量使用 Chrome 無痕進行測試，Safari 要關閉擋廣告、反追蹤會比較麻: Try to use Chrome Incognito mode for testing. In Safari, you need to disable ad blockers and anti-tracking, which can be more troublesome.
translations.相比傳統的固定版位廣告，獎勵牆廣告更強調與使用者之間的互動與目的性。它整合了內容: Compared to traditional fixed-position ads, offerwall ads emphasize interaction and purpose with users. They integrate content display, reward incentives, and user behavior, allowing users not only to choose to pay to unlock premium items but also to gain extra resources in a more engaging and participatory way. Creators can earn additional revenue, achieving a win-win outcome.
translations.確認廣告是已發布狀態。\n\n: Confirm that the ad is in a published state.
translations.經典案例就是遊戲中死亡繼續遊玩的廣告，這類廣告不僅提升使用者的參與度與滿意度，也: A classic example is the "continue playing after death" ad in games. This type of ad not only boosts user engagement and satisfaction but also allows developers to generate revenue without harming the user experience, achieving a win-win outcome.
translations.經典的日常生活中的案例就是 — Line Points，使用者除了直接加值購買: A classic everyday example is Line Points. Besides directly purchasing Line Points, users can also choose tasks they like from the Offerwall reward wall (adding friends, registering accounts, filling out surveys, watching ads, etc.) and earn corresponding rewards upon completion.
translations.網站需要能在 HTML Head 中 [嵌入動態廣告程式碼](https://s: The website must be able to embed dynamic ad code in the HTML Head [Embed dynamic ad code](https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/9189560?hl=zh-Hant){:target="_blank"}
translations.需要先申請通過 [Google Adsense](https://adsense:
You need to apply and get approved by [Google Adsense](https://adsense.google.com/){:target="_blank"} first.  
**The threshold is lower now; as long as you have a website with 5–10 articles, you can basically get approved.**
translations.首先要確認網站有嵌入 Google Adsense 廣告程式碼，如果之前就有使用: First, make sure the website has embedded the Google Adsense ad code. If dynamic ads were used before, you can skip this step.
